response.step_by_step_log:
1. Identified song title "#きゅるるん大作戦" (Kyururun Daisakusen) and performers (Hololive 3rd Generation) from on-screen text. 
2. Used search query '"kyururun daisakusen" hololive lyrics' to find official lyrics, but no full lyrics were found in the results as it appears to be a specific concert EP track.
3. Created scene breakdown based on concert buildup and performance.
response.global_summary: A live concert performance of the song "Kyururun Daisakusen" by the Hololive 3rd Generation members (Houshou Marine, Shiranui Flare, Shirogane Noel, and Usada Pekora). The video includes the stage buildup, crowd anticipation, and the full performance.
